signal_sql: (taker_buy_volume / NULLIF(volume, 0) - AVG(taker_buy_volume / NULLIF(volume, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY open_time ROWS BETWEEN 23 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)) / NULLIF(STDDEV_SAMP(taker_buy_volume / NULLIF(volume, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY open_time ROWS BETWEEN 23 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 0)
